MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-06-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PMIG FINANCIAL, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL WITHHOLD $35 PER PAY PERIOD ($70 PER MONTH) FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS AND PAY THAT SUM TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED. CERTIFIED COPIES OF FILED ORDER MAILED TO LEVYING OFFICER AND PARTIES. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TIM MUSCAT, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenosian & Miele, LLP (Tel: 323-297-2100) for judgment creditor PMGI Financial, LLC;
Judgment debtor CHRISTINA RANGEL (Tel: 415-240-2313) in pro per.

PLAINTIFF PMIG FINANCIAL, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is denied. The levying officer shall withhold $35 per pay period ($70 per month) from debtor's earnings and pay that sum to the judgment creditor.

Order signed and filed. Certified copies of filed order mailed to levying officer and parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMIG FINANCIAL, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued to August 6, 2024 on the court's motion.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
